title: Temporal Mirror Studies
description: Four independent mirror-world compositions testing same-person life-stage consistency without reference dependencies.
creative_direction: Each image stages one protagonist across multiple ages in a different environment, using reflections, split lighting, and spatial reasoning to make separate life stages coexist in one square frame.

en.title: Temporal Mirror Studies
en.description: Four independent mirror-world compositions testing same-person life-stage consistency without reference dependencies.

zh-CN.title: 时空镜像单图
zh-CN.description: 四张独立镜像世界构图，测试同一人物不同人生阶段在一个画面内共存。
